message:
test(fcp-core): pin SupplyChainAttestation serde + signing-bytes roundtrip (flywheel_connectors-o0grt)

Bead asks for SignedAttestation serde+verify roundtrip. No type literally
named SignedAttestation exists in fcp-core; the closest analogue is
SupplyChainAttestation in supply_chain.rs:282, which carries a
SupplyChainSignature envelope, deterministic signing_bytes(), and
canonical_bytes() in CBOR/JSON.

Coverage: 12-element SUPPLY_CHAIN_ATTESTATION_SIGNED_FIELDS strict
ordering, AttestationPredicateType URI-renames (SLSA / in-toto) with
PascalCase + snake_case rejection sentinel, 4-field SupplyChainSignature
shape, full attestation 13-key JSON shape, JSON + CBOR + canonical JSON +
canonical CBOR round-trips, signing_bytes determinism for same struct,
signing_bytes idempotent under signature-envelope mutation,
signing_bytes flips when slsa_level/builder_id/predicate_type/builder_allowlist
mutates, signing_bytes nontrivial-length lower bound (schema prefix
overhead), empty builder_allowlist + None invocation_id omission via
skip_serializing_if, CBOR Value-inspection pinning predicate_type URI
through binary encoding, canonical JSON + CBOR decode to same struct.

17 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-o0grt cargo test -p
fcp-core --test signed_attestation_roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
